CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Nov-21-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
GREGORY J. BROD, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Rosalia Castleton
STEVE PABROS, Esq. on behalf of defendant Karen Loo

The parties reached a settlement after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendant Karen Loo to pay plaintiff Rosalia Castleton the sum of $75,000.00. Each side to bear own costs and fees. Parties agreed to the settlement on the record.

Judge pro tem: Richard Warren; Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: JoAnn Bryce CSR #3321 (206)
